snippets: Amberg has a long brewing tradition.
Brewing is an important part of the local culture in Amberg.
Multiple local breweries operate in Amberg.
Visitors can experience local beer culture in Amberg.
The Tourist Information connects visitors with beer experts.
Brewery-related experiences can be arranged through the Tourist Information.
Kummert Bräu is a brewery in Amberg.
Kummert Bräu produces a Doppelbock beer.
The Kummert Bräu Doppelbock is used to produce a beer spirit.
The beer spirit is called Kummert Bräu Bockbierbrand.
Sterkbier is a strong beer produced in Amberg.
Sterkbier is used as the base for a distilled spirit.
The distilled spirit is called Bierbrand Sterk.
The Biertrager’l is a souvenir from Amberg.
The Biertrager’l contains five bottles of beer.
Each bottle in the Biertrager’l comes from a different local brewery.
The Biertrager’l includes an Amberg beer glass.
The Biertrager’l represents the diversity of local breweries.
The Biertrager’l is sold at the Tourist Information.
The Biertrager’l is available for purchase only in-store.
The Biertrager’l is produced by Jura Werkstätten Amberg-Sulzbach.
Jura Werkstätten Amberg-Sulzbach is a social enterprise.
The Amberger Bierfest is held annually.
The Amberger Bierfest takes place on the Bleichwiese.
The Bleichwiese is located at the Amberger Congress Centrum.
The Amberger Bierfest features local breweries.
A special beer glass is designed for the Bierfest.
The Bierfest glass has a volume of 0.3 liters.
The Bierfest glass is available as a souvenir.
The Bierfest glass can be purchased at the Tourist Information.
The price of the Bierfest glass is 3 euros.
Amberg offers traditional Bavarian cuisine.
Regional dishes are available in Amberg and the surrounding district.
The term Schmankerl refers to regional specialties.
Schmankerl includes traditional Bavarian dishes.
Traditional Bavarian taverns are called Wirtshäuser.
Wirtshäuser in Amberg serve hearty regional food.
Beer gardens are common in Amberg.
Beer gardens allow visitors to enjoy drinks outdoors.
Beer gardens are popular after outdoor activities.
Amberg is part of a region designated as Genussort Bayern.
Genussort Bayern is a Bavarian quality label.
The Genussort designation highlights food and drink quality.
The designation reflects the diversity of regional cuisine.
The designation includes local beer culture.
The designation connects Amberg to Bavarian gastronomy branding.
